things.name: Potemkin Stairs
things.description: Iconic 192-step stairway from the city to the port, immortalised in Eisenstein's 1925 film

things.name: Opera and Ballet Theatre
things.description: 1887 Neo-Baroque opera house - one of the most beautiful in Europe with a stunning interior

things.name: Deribasivska Street
things.description: Odessa's pedestrian main street with 19th-century architecture, cafes and restaurants

things.name: Odessa Catacombs
things.description: 2,500km network of underground tunnels used by partisans in WWII - the world's largest catacomb

things.name: Arcadia Beach
things.description: Odessa's most popular beach and entertainment district with clubs and seaside restaurants

things.name: Vorontsov Palace
things.description: Elegant Neoclassical governor's palace with colonnaded loggia overlooking the sea

things.name: Odessa Fine Arts Museum
things.description: Classicist palace housing masterworks including Caravaggio, Rubens and Russian masters

things.name: Privoz Market
things.description: Vast open-air market with the freshest Black Sea fish, produce and local street food

things.name: Lanzheron Beach & Spa
things.description: City beach with a saltwater spa, beach clubs and great views of the Odessa skyline

things.name: Plague Column (Chumna Kolona)
things.description: 1827 column erected to give thanks for deliverance from the 1812-1814 plague epidemic
